posts.author: GHAgency (Rio Ippoliti)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone!

We are looking for a solve to get approval by different parties within the agency. The ideal flow looks like this…

Manager submits a Monday.com Form
Email gets sent to Manager to verify the information
Manager responds to email to verify prompting a status column to change to approved

I am aware of the Email Received integration but can’t figure out how to link the responses to the board.

Does anyone have any ideas of solutions? Please let me know! Thank you!

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey there! It sounds like the Emails & Activities feature would be helpful here!
Have you taken a look at it?

Let me know what you think!
